subcodes.first_line: O thou who art steadfast in the Covenant! Thy distinguished letter was received, and from its contents it became clear that at the time of return and arrival [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ثابت بر پیمان نامه نامی رسید از مضامین آشکار و پدید گشت که حین رجوع و وصول
subcodes.subjects: @greatness and influence of the Cause; of this Day, @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution
